name: portable-ai-bus
description: Chat-first AI workflow staging for Visual Studio Code workspaces.

commands.title: Portable AI Bus: Show Next Prompt
Portable AI Bus: Suspend Workspace Bus
Portable AI Bus: Resume Workspace Bus
Portable AI Bus: Remove Workspace Bus
Portable AI Bus: Open Human Instructions

chatParticipants.name: ai-bus
chatParticipants.description: Initialize, run, and manage the bus workflow in this workspace.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show the available AI Bus chat operations.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Stage the bus into the current workspace.

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start a task. Example: /start task: Fix auth flow goal: Keep tests green

commands.name: prompt
commands.description: Show the next prompt for the current phase.

commands.name: phase
commands.description: Set the workflow phase. Example: /phase READY_FOR_REVIEW

commands.name: suspend
commands.description: Suspend the staged overlay while preserving runtime state.

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Remove the workspace bus and staged files.

portableAiBus.instructionsFile.markdownDescription: Human instructions live in `[.ai-bus/HUMAN_GUIDE.md](command:portableAiBus.openHumanGuide)`. This path is staged into each initialized workspace.

portableAiBus.commandReference.default: instructions | initialize the bus for this repo | start task: <task> goal: <goal> validation: <command> | show status | show next prompt | set phase to READY_FOR_REVIEW | suspend the bus | resume the bus | remove the bus | open settings
portableAiBus.commandReference.markdownDescription: Basic chat instruction commands for `@ai-bus`. Use this as the quick in-settings reference for the LLM-facing workflow surface.

portableAiBus.providers.markdownDescription: Optional explicit provider IDs to install in the workspace. Leave empty to auto-detect from repo markers and fall back to the recommended pair.

portableAiBus.stageTasksJson.markdownDescription: Stage `.vscode/tasks.json` from the bundled template when the workspace does not already have one.

portableAiBus.stageCompatibilityWrappers.markdownDescription: Also stage the legacy `.cmd` and `.ps1` wrappers into the workspace root. Keep this off for a chat-only user experience.

portableAiBus.showStatusBar.markdownDescription: Show the current AI Bus phase in the VS Code status bar.

portableAiBus.autoInitializeOnOpen.markdownDescription: When a workspace opens and no `.ai-bus` folder exists, prompt to initialize it.
